历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9821 → 7481 → 18766 → 12600 → 12702. In 2023, there was an abnormal large backward shift (18766), followed by a rapid rebound to 12600 in 2024, and basically stable at 12702 in 2025, with the last two years trending towards stability. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12702. The enrollment plan for Jinan University in Jilin Province for science (physics category) was: 37 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The planned enrollment for 2026 is 52, an increase of 4 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 8.3%, which slightly intensifies competition due to increased admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 50-60 range in recent years, making it a nationally renowned comprehensive university. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 41st in Douyin popularity, rated as relatively hot, with medium-to-high short video exposure. There is no obvious signal of a cutoff anomaly in Jinan University's historical admission data in Jilin Province. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, indicating balanced disciplinary strength with strong support in both humanities and science/engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, science and engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly recommended due to social popularity, which highly matches Jinan University's science enrollment majors (Electronic Information Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc.). The rising popularity of related majors may push up overall competition. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 110,868. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 72%, the estimated number of physics category examinees is about 79,936, a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025, leading to a small reduction in the competition base. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, in the South China region, which is a cross-province application for Jilin Province examinees. Its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.5%-1% (total national enrollment about 4000-5000), which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference signal. Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 12702, the 2026 expansion of 8.3% (shifting the ranking to about 13337 based on supply-demand elasticity), a slight decrease in total examinees (physics category reduced by about 485), and the rising popularity of majors like Electronic Information/Electrical Engineering, the estimated minimum admission ranking for 2026 is a slight adjustment from 13337, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 13317, and a fluctuation range of 12817-13817.

For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 12817), it is advisable to strongly aim for Tier 1 flagship majors.
